allow: PowerShell($css = Get-Content "public\\css\\filament\\filament\\app.css" -Raw; foreach \($pat in @\('\\.fi-sidebar\\{[^}]{0,600}', '\\.fi-topbar\\{[^}]{0,600}', '--sidebar-width[^;}]{0,80}', '\\.fi-body-has-topbar[^{]{0,120}\\{[^}]{0,400}'\)\) { "`n=== $pat ==="; [regex]::Matches\($css, $pat\) | Select-Object -First 4 | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } })

PowerShell($css = Get-Content "public\\css\\filament\\filament\\app.css" -Raw; foreach \($pat in @\('[^{}]{0,120}\\{[^}]{0,200}--sidebar-width[^}]{0,200}\\}', '\\.fi-topbar-ctn[^{]{0,80}\\{[^}]{0,300}', '\\.fi-body-has-topbar \\.fi-topbar[^{]{0,60}\\{[^}]{0,200}', 'sidebar-open[^{]{0,140}\\{[^}]{0,250}'\)\) { "`n=== $pat ==="; [regex]::Matches\($css, $pat\) | Select-Object -First 8 | ForEach-Object { $_.Value; '---' } })

PowerShell($css = Get-Content "public\\css\\filament\\filament\\app.css" -Raw; foreach \($pat in @\('[^{}]{0,300}\\.fi-sidebar[^{}]{0,120}\\{[^}]{0,120}position[^}]{0,120}\\}', '[^{}]{0,250}\\.fi-main-ctn\\{[^}]{0,250}\\}', '[^{}]{0,200}\\.fi-topbar-ctn[^{}]{0,60}\\{[^}]{0,200}\\}'\)\) { "`n=== PATRON ==="; [regex]::Matches\($css, $pat\) | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { $_.Value; '---' } })
